actions.script:
import groovy.json.JsonOutput
String effectiveMathModelId = (mathModelId ?: 'AgentMoquiRagModel_v1').toString() Map parameterEnvelope = [ mathModelId : effectiveMathModelId, runType : runTypeEnumId, runName : runName, sourceServiceName : sourceServiceName, sourceToolName : sourceToolName ] if (parametersJson) parameterEnvelope.parametersJson = parametersJson
def runValue = ec.entity.makeValue('moqui.math.MathModelRun') runValue.setSequencedIdPrimary() mathModelRunId = runValue.mathModelRunId runValue.mathModelId = effectiveMathModelId runValue.parameters = JsonOutput.toJson(parameterEnvelope) runValue.messages = [runName, runTypeEnumId, sourceServiceName, sourceToolName].findAll { it }.join(' | ') runValue.hasError = 'N' runValue.create()

def dataValue = ec.entity.makeValue('moqui.math.MathModelData') dataValue.setSequencedIdPrimary() mathModelDataId = dataValue.mathModelDataId dataValue.mathModelId = mathModelId dataValue.dataTypeEnumId = dataTypeEnumId dataValue.purposeEnumId = purposeEnumId dataValue.generatedByRunId = generatedByRunId dataValue.vectorId = vectorId dataValue.matrixId = matrixId dataValue.tensorId = tensorId dataValue.transformationId = transformationId dataValue.approximatedFunctionId = approximatedFunctionId dataValue.graphVertexId = graphVertexId dataValue.graphEdgeId = graphEdgeId dataValue.meshKCellId = meshKCellId dataValue.meshGroupId = meshGroupId dataValue.fromDate = fromDate ?: ec.user.nowTimestamp dataValue.thruDate = thruDate dataValue.sequenceNum = sequenceNum dataValue.uomId = uomId dataValue.create()

String effectiveMathModelId = (mathModelId ?: 'AgentMoquiRagModel_v1').toString() String embeddingKey = Integer.toHexString((embeddingModel ?: 'unknown').toString().hashCode()).toUpperCase() effectiveTensorId = (tensorId ?: "AgEmbTen_${embeddingKey}_${embeddingDimensions ?: 0}").toString() int dimensions = (embeddingDimensions ?: 0) as Integer int docs = Math.max(0, (documentCount ?: 0) as Integer)
def tensorValue = ec.entity.find('moqui.math.Tensor').condition('tensorId', effectiveTensorId).one() boolean tensorExists = tensorValue != null if (tensorValue) tensorValue = tensorValue.cloneValue() if (!tensorValue) { tensorValue = ec.entity.makeValue('moqui.math.Tensor') tensorValue.tensorId = effectiveTensorId } tensorValue.tensorTypeEnumId = 'TtDense' tensorValue.purposeEnumId = 'TpOriginal' tensorValue.storageTypeEnumId = 'TstContent' tensorValue.memoryFormatEnumId = 'TmfContig' tensorValue.name = "Agent Prompt Embeddings ${embeddingModel ?: ''}".trim() tensorValue.description = "Embedding tensor metadata for index ${indexName ?: ''} via ${embeddingProvider ?: 'unknown'}".trim() tensorValue.rank = 2 tensorValue.shape = "[${docs},${dimensions}]" tensorValue.size = docs * dimensions if (tensorExists) tensorValue.update() else tensorValue.create()
String tensorContentId = "${effectiveTensorId}Cnt" def contentValue = ec.entity.find('moqui.math.TensorContent').condition('tensorContentId', tensorContentId).one() boolean contentExists = contentValue != null if (contentValue) contentValue = contentValue.cloneValue() if (!contentValue) { contentValue = ec.entity.makeValue('moqui.math.TensorContent') contentValue.tensorContentId = tensorContentId } contentValue.tensorId = effectiveTensorId contentValue.contentLocation = contentLocation ?: "opensearch://${indexName ?: ''}/embedding" contentValue.contentTypeEnumId = (contentFormat == 'opensearch-knn') ? 'TCntManifest' : 'TCntCustom' contentValue.description = "Embedding tensor content metadata for ${embeddingModel ?: 'unknown'}" if (contentExists) contentValue.update() else contentValue.create()
ec.service.sync().name('org.moqui.agent.AgentMathModelServices.link#AgentMathModelData') .parameters([ mathModelId : effectiveMathModelId, generatedByRunId : mathModelRunId, dataTypeEnumId : 'MmdtTensor', purposeEnumId : 'MmdpModelOutputs', tensorId : effectiveTensorId ]).call()

import groovy.json.JsonOutput
String effectiveMathModelId = (mathModelId ?: 'AgentMoquiRagModel_v1').toString() Map runResult = ec.service.sync().name('org.moqui.agent.AgentMathModelServices.create#AgentMathModelRun') .parameters([ mathModelId : effectiveMathModelId, runTypeEnumId : 'AgentRunTelemetrySummary', runName : 'Tool Execution Summary', sourceServiceName : 'org.moqui.agent.AgentMathModelServices.summarize#AgentToolExecutionLogsToMathModelRun', parametersJson : JsonOutput.toJson([fromDate: fromDate, thruDate: thruDate, groupBy: groupBy]) ]).call() mathModelRunId = runResult.mathModelRunId
def binFind = ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentToolExecutionBin') if (fromDate) binFind.condition('binEndDateTime', ec.entity.conditionFactory.makeCondition('binEndDateTime', '>=', fromDate)) if (thruDate) binFind.condition('binStartDateTime', ec.entity.conditionFactory.makeCondition('binStartDateTime', '<=', thruDate)) List binRows = binFind.list()
BigDecimal totalTimeMillis = 0 int totalExecutions = 0 Map toolCounts = [:].withDefault { 0 } int successCount = 0 int errorCount = 0 int deniedCount = 0 int confirmationRequiredCount = 0 int hybridLlmRerankCount = 0 int rerankerFallbackCount = 0 binRows.each { row -> String toolName = (row.toolName ?: 'unknown') as String int execCount = (row.executionCount ?: 0) as Integer toolCounts[toolName] = (toolCounts[toolName] ?: 0) + execCount totalExecutions += execCount successCount += (row.successCount ?: 0) as Integer errorCount += (row.errorCount ?: 0) as Integer deniedCount += (row.deniedCount ?: 0) as Integer confirmationRequiredCount += (row.confirmationRequiredCount ?: 0) as Integer hybridLlmRerankCount += (row.hybridLlmRerankCount ?: 0) as Integer rerankerFallbackCount += (row.rerankerFallbackCount ?: 0) as Integer totalTimeMillis += (row.totalTimeMillis ?: 0) as BigDecimal } BigDecimal avgRunningTimeMillis = totalExecutions ? (totalTimeMillis / totalExecutions) : 0
def logFind = ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentToolExecutionElasticLog') if (fromDate) logFind.condition('logDate', ec.entity.conditionFactory.makeCondition('logDate', '>=', fromDate)) if (thruDate) logFind.condition('logDate', ec.entity.conditionFactory.makeCondition('logDate', '<=', thruDate)) List logRows = logFind.list() List<BigDecimal> timings = (logRows.collect { it.runningTimeMillis }.findAll { it != null } as List<BigDecimal>).sort() BigDecimal p95RunningTimeMillis = timings ? timings[Math.min(timings.size() - 1, Math.max(0, ((timings.size() * 0.95d).intValue() - 1)))] : 0
Map errorCounts = [:].withDefault { 0 } logRows.each { row -> if (row.errorMessage) errorCounts[row.errorMessage] = (errorCounts[row.errorMessage] ?: 0) + 1 } if (!binRows && logRows) { totalExecutions = logRows.size() toolCounts = [:].withDefault { 0 } successCount = 0 errorCount = 0 deniedCount = 0 confirmationRequiredCount = 0 hybridLlmRerankCount = 0 rerankerFallbackCount = 0 BigDecimal fallbackTotalTimeMillis = 0 logRows.each { row -> String toolName = (row.toolName ?: 'unknown') as String toolCounts[toolName] = (toolCounts[toolName] ?: 0) + 1 if (row.success == 'Y') successCount++ else errorCount++ if (row.resultStatus == 'denied') deniedCount++ if (row.confirmed == 'N' && row.riskLevelEnumId) confirmationRequiredCount++ if (row.searchMode == 'hybrid_llm_rerank') hybridLlmRerankCount++ if (row.rerankerFallbackUsed == 'Y') rerankerFallbackCount++ fallbackTotalTimeMillis += (row.runningTimeMillis ?: 0) as BigDecimal } avgRunningTimeMillis = totalExecutions ? (fallbackTotalTimeMillis / totalExecutions) : 0 }
summary = [ totalExecutions : totalExecutions, successCount : successCount, errorCount : errorCount, deniedCount : deniedCount, confirmationRequiredCount : confirmationRequiredCount, avgRunningTimeMillis : avgRunningTimeMillis, p95RunningTimeMillis : p95RunningTimeMillis, topTools : toolCounts.entrySet().sort { -it.value }.take(10).collect { [name: it.key, count: it.value] }, topErrors : errorCounts.entrySet().sort { -it.value }.take(10).collect { [name: it.key, count: it.value] }, hybridLlmRerankCount : hybridLlmRerankCount, rerankerFallbackCount : rerankerFallbackCount ]
ec.service.sync().name('org.moqui.agent.AgentMathModelServices.complete#AgentMathModelRun') .parameters([ mathModelRunId : mathModelRunId, resultSummaryJson : JsonOutput.toJson(summary) ]).call()
